D:\Tools\IDEs\QT\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\clipboard_sync.dir/objects.a
D:\Tools\IDEs\QT\Tools\mingw810_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\clipboard_sync.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\clipboard_sync.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Tools\IDEs\QT\Tools\mingw810_64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\clipboard_sync.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o clipboard_sync.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libclipboard_sync.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\clipboard_sync.dir\linkLibs.rsp
